identity.canonical_title: III.1 Orbital Metronome Synchronization: Tidal Locking as Phase-Accumulated Forc: τ_rm…

theory.technical_interpretation: III.1 Orbital Metronome Synchronization: Tidal Locking as Phase-Accumulated Forc: τ_rm… is a series / summation, written τ_rm net(t) = ∑_n=1^N(t) Δ τ(φ_n).. It is expressed as a sum or series over modes or indices, superposing discrete contributions. It is built from Δ, τ, n, N, defining τ_rm net(t). Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
